format.label: Muundo
format.value: Kitu chochote chenye thamani ya kutengenezwa

canvas.title: Tunabuni kile watu wanakikumbuka.
canvas.subtitle: Multimedia, branding, graphic design, film, photography, music, na uzoefu wa kidijitali ulioundwa kushika umakini na kusogeza hadhira.
canvas.boardCopy: Brand storytelling, production planning, na digital growth vinawekwa pamoja kama mfumo mmoja wa studio.

videoProduction.label: Video Production
videoProduction.meta: Coverage, edits, na cinematic rollout frames

brandIdentity.label: Brand Identity
brandIdentity.meta: Systems, voice, na visual direction tayari kwa launch

printDesign.label: Print Design
printDesign.meta: Posters, packaging, na physical brand surfaces

musicStudio.label: Music Studio
musicStudio.meta: Recording support, production notes, na artist development

digitalCampaigns.label: Digital Campaigns
digitalCampaigns.meta: Content systems, landing flows, na social momentum

liveStreaming.label: Live Streaming
liveStreaming.meta: Event signal paths, scene planning, na audience delivery

showreel.title: Reel ya cinematic ya mwelekeo wa kazi, format, na nafasi zinazofuata.
showreel.description: Hizi ni placeholder safi kwa case studies, visual za kampeni, edits, na studio outputs zijazo. Media halisi ya wateja inaweza kuwekwa hapa bila kubadili mfumo wa layout.
showreel.modalTitle: Reel ya placeholder, tayari kwa media ya mwisho.
showreel.modalDescription: Modal hii imewekwa nyepesi kwa makusudi. Inaonyesha jinsi Tripod inaweza kuwasilisha film frames, campaign edits, print sequences, na studio visuals kabla ya media ya mwisho kuongezwa.

modalNotes.one: Compressed poster placeholders zinaweka homepage ikiwa nyepesi wakati video halisi bado zinaandaliwa.
modalNotes.two: Reel ya mwisho inaweza kuchanganya branding clips, photography sequences, motion snippets, na studio footage.
modalNotes.three: Hakuna majina ya wateja ya kubuni au matokeo ya kubuni yanayoonyeshwa hapa. Kila kitu kinabaki wazi kuwa kinaweza kubadilishwa.

frameA.title: Frames za Uzinduzi wa Identity
frameA.meta: Poster direction, brand layout, na rollout placeholders

frameB.title: Mfuatano wa Edit Timeline
frameB.meta: Storyboard cuts, motion pacing, na recap placeholders

frameC.title: Mfumo wa Campaign Screens
frameC.meta: Digital touchpoints, landing sections, na content rhythm

frameD.title: Dokezo za Studio Session
frameD.meta: Music visuals, cover directions, na recording placeholders

timeline.title: Huduma zimepangwa kama edit, si brochure.
timeline.description: Kila track inaonyesha jinsi Tripod inavyosogeza idea kutoka concept hadi production bila kuvunja story kati ya disciplines.

video.label: Video
video.title: Videography, drone coverage, na live capture
video.description: Panga visual coverage kwa kampeni, launches, events, na branded stories kwa workflow inayosaidia filming, edits, na delivery tayari kwa platforms.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Cinematic coverage, interviews, short-form edits, drone support, na live streaming vinaweza kupangwa kwenye timeline moja.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Inafaa kwa event organizers, brands, artists, na institutions wanaohitaji packages za coverage bila kutafuta vendors wengi.

branding.label: Branding
branding.title: Brand strategy na identity direction
branding.description: Jenga brand story kwanza, kisha ibebe kwenye visual systems, launch assets, printed pieces, na campaign touchpoints.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Naming support, identity planning, presentation decks, na launch kits vinaweza kuishi pamoja kwenye production board moja.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Ni muhimu kwa businesses, startups, organizations, na personal brands zinazohitaji structure imara kabla ya kusambaza content.

design.label: Design
design.title: Graphic design, print direction, na layout systems
design.description: Unda campaign graphics, print assets, social content, na presentation surfaces kwa visual language inayobaki imara kwenye formats tofauti.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Tripod inaweza kusonga kutoka concept boards hadi posters, flyers, social kits, signage, na print-ready layouts kwa fast execution.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Imejengwa kwa promotions, events, launches, public campaigns, na creative communication inayohitaji backbone ya visual yenye nguvu.

photo.label: Photo
photo.title: Photography kwa brands, events, na products
photo.description: Tumia photography kama sehemu ya mfumo mpana wa storytelling, kutoka campaign stills na event coverage hadi product frames na behind-the-scenes visuals.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Photo direction inaweza kusaidia social campaigns, web launches, media kits, brand lookbooks, na editorial content.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Inafaa kwa institutions, artists, campaign teams, personal brands, na businesses zinazohitaji visual assets safi zinazoweza kutumika tena.

motion.label: Motion
motion.title: Motion graphics na animated visual layers
motion.description: Ongeza movement pale inapohitajika: title systems, social assets, campaign transitions, explainer visuals, na nguvu ya digital presentation.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Motion graphics zinaweza kuunganisha branding, video, digital marketing, na presentation design bila kuongeza uzito mkubwa wa production.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Ni muhimu kwa product launches, recap videos, online campaigns, reels, presentation moments, na explainers zinazolenga audience.

music.label: Music
music.title: Music production, recording support, na training
music.description: Saidia artists na learners kupitia music production, vocal recording, beat making, instrument training, na creative coaching.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Studio pathway inaweza kuunganisha lessons, practice sessions, recording support, na artist development bila kufanya offer iwe nzito.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Imejengwa kwa artists, young creatives, institutions, na yeyote anayetafuta beginner-friendly learning yenye studio energy ya vitendo.

digital.label: Digital
digital.title: Digital marketing, websites, na app experiences
digital.description: Beba art direction ile ile kwenye websites, landing pages, digital campaigns, na product surfaces zinazosaidia creative work kubadilika kuwa matokeo.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Digital growth work inaweza kuunganisha messaging, design systems, campaign visuals, na modern web builds ndani ya workflow moja.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Inafaa kwa businesses, startups, organizations, na campaign teams zinazohitaji uwepo bora mtandaoni na lead capture iliyo wazi.

layers.title: Kazi ya ubunifu inakuwa imara zaidi pale layer sahihi zinapokuwa wazi.
layers.description: Chagua layer ili kuona jinsi strategy, colour, typography, campaign thinking, na motion vinavyounda composition ya mwisho.

strategy.label: Layer {number} Strategy
strategy.title: Strategy huipa kazi mwelekeo.
strategy.description: Goals, audience, message, na format decisions husaidia kila uchaguzi unaofuata kuwa wa makusudi badala ya mapambo tu.
strategy.effect: Layer hii inafafanua brief, story angle, na maamuzi yanayoongoza production support, design, na digital services.
strategy.mobileSummary: Strategy huweka mradi wazi kabla ya visual layers kuongezwa.

colour.label: Layer {number} Colour
colour.title: Colour huweka hali ya hisia.
colour.description: Warm contrast, visual hierarchy, na accents zilizodhibitiwa hufanya kazi ionekane ya youthful, premium, na rahisi kufuatilia.
colour.effect: Layer hii inabadilisha mood, energy, readability, na namna brand storytelling inavyoshika umakini kwenye print na screens.
colour.mobileSummary: Colour huunda mood, contrast, na recognition kwenye mfumo mzima.

typography.label: Layer {number} Typography
typography.title: Typography hubeba sauti ya kazi.
typography.description: Headlines, captions, labels, na presentation rhythm hutafsiri creative direction kuwa mawasiliano yanayosomeka.
typography.effect: Layer hii inaathiri clarity, personality, campaign hierarchy, na kasi ambayo watu wanaelewa ujumbe wa kazi.
typography.mobileSummary: Typography hugeuza idea kuwa sauti ambayo watu wanaweza kusoma na kukumbuka.

campaign.label: Layer {number} Campaign
campaign.title: Campaign thinking huunganisha kila output.
campaign.description: Hugeuza assets tofauti kuwa release moja iliyoratibiwa kwenye social, print, web, events, na media nyingine za kusaidia.
campaign.effect: Layer hii inaweka posters, rollout moments, launch content, na digital growth goals zikiwa zimeunganishwa kama output moja ya studio.
campaign.mobileSummary: Campaign logic huweka assets tofauti zifanye kazi kama release moja.

motion.label: Layer {number} Motion
motion.title: Motion huipa composition uhai.
motion.description: Transitions, reveals, waveform cues, na presentation shifts hufanya visual zilizotulia zihisi hai bila kuwa na kelele nyingi.
motion.effect: Layer hii inaongeza pace, emphasis, na living-studio feel kwenye showreels, campaign visuals, interfaces, na content teasers.
motion.mobileSummary: Motion huongeza energy na emphasis bila kuulemea ukurasa.

wall.title: Ukuta uliodhibitiwa wa formats, references, na production surfaces.
wall.description: Poster placeholders, print samples, colour swatches, contact sheets, na behind-the-scenes layouts hujenga studio atmosphere bila kujifanya kazi zisizokamilika ni final.

poster.title: Mwelekeo wa poster
poster.description: Layout placeholders kwa campaigns, launches, event art, au visual announcements.

contactSheet.title: Uchaguzi wa frames
contactSheet.description: Muonekano wa film-style wa stills, storyboard moments, na edit references zinazosubiri media ya mwisho.

printSample.title: Masomo ya vifaa vya print
printSample.description: Samples zilizopangwa kwa flyers, packaging, branded collateral, na physical production surfaces nyingine.

storyboard.title: Pacing ya storyboard
storyboard.description: Mfuatano rahisi kwa motion planning, recaps, ad edits, na mtiririko wa hadithi ya presentation.

swatches.title: Lugha ya colour
swatches.description: Warm orange, gold, na cream accents zinazofanya art direction ibaki kutambulika kwenye themes zote.

bts.title: Atmosphere ya production
bts.description: Behind-the-scenes placeholders zinazoonyesha process bila kubuni locations, watu, au equipment.

cta.title: Leta mradi wako unaofuata ndani ya studio.
cta.description: Iwe unahitaji branding, production support, digital growth, music work, au website iliyo tayari kwa campaign, Tripod inaweza kuunda hatua inayofuata pamoja nawe.

hero.title: Huduma za ubunifu zilizojengwa kwa usimulizi wa chapa na ukuaji wa kidijitali.
hero.subtitle: Tripod inaunganisha mwelekeo wa ubunifu, ubora wa uzalishaji, na utekelezaji wa haraka katika studio moja ya huduma nyingi.
hero.highlightText: Kuanzia mkakati hadi vifaa vya uzinduzi, tunaweka mchakato ukiwa wazi, wa ushirikiano, na tayari kwa kampeni halisi.

coreServices.title: Nguzo saba, mfumo mmoja wa studio unaounganisha kila kitu.
coreServices.subtitle: Kila huduma imeundwa kufanya kazi yenyewe au kama sehemu ya kampeni, uzinduzi, au mfumo mkubwa wa maudhui.

brandStrategy.title: Mkakati wa Chapa na Utambulisho
brandStrategy.description: Tengeneza nafasi iliyo wazi zaidi, sauti iliyo makini, na mfumo thabiti wa utambulisho wa biashara yako.
bullets: Mwelekeo wa majina, ujumbe wa chapa, na upangaji wa utambulisho wa kuona
Mifumo ya nembo, mwongozo wa chapa, na seti za nyenzo tayari kwa uzinduzi

creativeDesign.title: Ubunifu wa Kisanii
creativeDesign.description: Unda taswira za kuvutia kwa kampeni, mawasilisho, mitandao ya kijamii, vifungashio, na mawasiliano ya chapa.
bullets: Michoro ya kampeni, mpangilio wa kurasa, na ubunifu wa maudhui ya mitandao
Mwelekeo wa kisanii unaoweka kila sehemu ya chapa ikiwa imepangwa vizuri

printingProduction.title: Uchapishaji na Uzalishaji
printingProduction.description: Badilisha mawazo yaliyoidhinishwa kuwa nyenzo za kimwili zilizotengenezwa vizuri kwa uratibu safi na wa kuaminika.
bullets: Vipeperushi, mabango, alama, vifungashio, na vifaa vya matukio
Mipango ya uzalishaji inayolenga umaliziaji, uthabiti, na muda

digitalMarketing.title: Masoko ya Kidijitali
digitalMarketing.description: Jenga ukuaji wa kidijitali kwa upangaji wa kampeni, mwelekeo wa maudhui, na ufuatiliaji wa utendaji unaotumika.
bullets: Kalenda za maudhui, usaidizi wa uzinduzi, na ulinganifu wa ubunifu wa kampeni
Ujumbe unaolenga hadhira na taarifa zinazosaidia maamuzi bora

photographyVideography.title: Upigaji Picha na Video
photographyVideography.description: Tengeneza taswira zinazobeba ujumbe wako kwa uwazi katika chapa, bidhaa, matukio, na matumizi ya mitandao ya kijamii.
bullets: Upigaji wa chapa, picha za bidhaa, mahojiano, reels, na huduma za matukio
Ubora wa uzalishaji unaojengwa kwa uhariri, maudhui mafupi, na vifaa vya uzinduzi

musicStudioAcademy.title: Studio ya Muziki na Chuo
musicStudioAcademy.description: Saidia wasanii, wabunifu, na wanaojifunza kwa vipindi vya kurekodi, maudhui ya muziki, na maendeleo ya vitendo.
bullets: Usaidizi wa kurekodi, utengenezaji wa maudhui ya muziki, na taswira za wasanii
Njia za kujifunza kwa wabunifu wanaotaka uzoefu wa studio unaotumika

featuredDevelopment.title: Utengenezaji wa Tovuti na Programu
featuredDevelopment.description: Tunabuni na kutengeneza tovuti, landing pages, zana za ndani, na uzoefu wa bidhaa unaounganisha taswira imara na mfumo wa kisasa wa kidijitali.
capabilities: Tovuti za masoko zenye mwitikio na landing pages zilizoelekezwa vizuri
Mifumo ya ubunifu wa bidhaa yenye mwonekano wa premium wa glass card
Mizunguko ya haraka kutoka mpangilio wa maudhui hadi UI iliyo tayari kuzinduliwa
Builds zinazosaidia kampeni, ukusanyaji wa leads, na uwepo wa chapa

workflow.title: Mkakati Kwanza
workflow.description: Tunaanza kwa kulinganisha malengo ya ukurasa, mahitaji ya hadhira, na njia za ubadilishaji kabla ya skrini kutengenezwa.

workflow.title: Ubunifu Wenye Muktadha
workflow.description: Mpangilio, mwendo, na maudhui hufanya kazi pamoja ili bidhaa ionekane imekusudiwa tangu scroll ya kwanza.

workflow.title: Uzinduzi Wenye Kasi
workflow.description: Build ya mwisho huandaliwa kwa handoff, maboresho ya ukuaji, na upanuzi wa maudhui ya baadaye.

featuredDevelopment.cta: Jadili Mradi wa Tovuti au Programu

process.title: Mchakato mfupi unaojengwa kwa uwazi na kasi.
process.subtitle: Tunafanya ushirikiano uwe wa vitendo ili mawazo yasogee kutoka brief hadi delivery bila kupoteza mwelekeo.

discover.title: Gundua
discover.description: Tunapanga malengo, hadhira, marejeleo, muda, na mchanganyiko wa huduma unaofaa mradi.

shape.title: Unda Mwelekeo
shape.description: Tunageuza mwongozo kuwa concept inayofanya kazi kwa muundo wa maudhui, chaguo za mtindo, na vipaumbele vya utekelezaji.

produce.title: Tekeleza
produce.description: Ubunifu, maudhui, uzalishaji, na build husonga kwa mpangilio mmoja wenye sehemu wazi za maoni.

deliver.title: Kabidhi
deliver.description: Nyenzo za mwisho huandaliwa kwa uzinduzi, uchapishaji, uchapishaji wa mtandaoni, au hatua inayofuata ya kampeni yako.

cta.title: Chagua huduma unayotaka kujadili.
cta.subtitle: Anza na huduma inayolingana na hitaji lako la sasa na tutajenga hatua zinazofuata pamoja.
cta.serviceButtonHint: Inafungua WhatsApp ikiwa na ujumbe wa huduma husika

serviceButtons.musicStudioAcademy: Uliza kuhusu Studio ya Muziki na Chuo

cta.primaryButton: Fungua Mazungumzo ya Tovuti na Programu

hero.title: Portfolio inayojengwa kupitia branding, visuals, maudhui, na kampeni.
hero.subtitle: Mwonekano wenye vichujio wa kadi za portfolio zilizo tayari kubadilishwa baadaye kwa kazi halisi katika print, motion, matukio, na usimulizi wa kidijitali.

grid.title: Chunguza portfolio kwa aina ya kazi au aina ya kampeni.
grid.resultCount: {count, plural, =0 {Hakuna kazi zinazoonekana} one {Kazi # inaonekana} other {Kazi # zinaonekana}}
grid.empty: Bado hakuna kazi ya portfolio inayolingana na kichujio hiki.

featured.title: Tumia portfolio kama mwanzo wa brief yako inayofuata.
featured.subtitle: Ikiwa mtindo, aina ya kazi, au mwelekeo wa kampeni unakuvutia, tunaweza kuutumia kuongoza mazungumzo yanayofuata.
featured.note: Vipengele vya portfolio katika ukurasa huu vinatumia majina ya generic placeholder ili kazi halisi ya baadaye iweze kuongezwa bila kubadilisha muundo wa uzoefu.

cta.title: Uko tayari kubadilisha marejeleo kuwa mpango wa mradi?
cta.subtitle: Tueleze aina ya kazi unayohitaji na tutajenga mchanganyiko bora wa huduma za ubunifu, production, na digital.

project1.title: Placeholder ya Mfumo wa Utambulisho wa Chapa
project1.description: Placeholder inayoweza kubadilishwa kwa rollout ya utambulisho, seti ya mwelekeo wa kuona, na touchpoints za chapa za baadaye.

project2.title: Placeholder ya Fremu za Video ya Kampeni
project2.description: Nafasi safi ya kazi za baadaye za motion, reels, mfululizo wa edits, au usimulizi wa video ya uzinduzi.

project3.title: Placeholder ya Kifurushi cha Kampeni ya Kidijitali
project3.description: Placeholder inayonyumbulika kwa visuals za uzinduzi wa kampeni, assets za paid social, na mifumo ya maudhui ya kidijitali.

project4.title: Placeholder ya Seti ya Print Production
project4.description: Placeholder ya print iliyo tayari kubadilishwa kwa posters, flyers, packaging layouts, au vifaa vya matukio.

project5.title: Placeholder ya Mfululizo wa Graphic Content
project5.description: Seti ya generic visuals kwa social graphics, paneli za kampeni, au creative layouts za chapa.

project6.title: Placeholder ya Mkusanyiko wa Picha
project6.description: Placeholder ya portfolio kwa brand shoots za baadaye, product stills, na uteuzi wa picha za editorial.

project7.title: Placeholder ya Hadithi ya Event Coverage
project7.description: Kadi ya baadaye kwa event capture, highlight edits, na deliverables za recap content.

project8.title: Placeholder ya Kifurushi cha Visuals za Muziki
project8.description: Placeholder ya generic kwa cover art, promo visuals, na maudhui ya studio session.

project9.title: Placeholder ya Presentation ya Uzinduzi wa Chapa
project9.description: Placeholder kwa launch decks za baadaye, maonyesho ya chapa, na presentation assets za kampeni.

hero.title: Recording support, music production, na mafunzo ya ala ndani ya nafasi moja ya ubunifu.
hero.subtitle: Tripod inaunganisha beginner-friendly learning, studio support ya vitendo, na artist development katika safari moja ya muziki iliyo wazi.

recording.title: Recording Support
recording.description: Vipindi vya kurekodi vilivyoongozwa kwa vocals, demos, na maendeleo ya miradi ya ubunifu.

production.title: Beat Making
production.description: Vipindi vya production vinavyojengwa kulingana na mwelekeo wa wimbo, arrangement, na uchaguzi wa sauti.

training.title: Instrument Training
training.description: Vipindi vya kujifunza kwa vitendo kwa piano, guitar, drums, na vocals.

coaching.title: Creative Coaching
coaching.description: Msaada wa confidence, consistency, na hatua zinazofuata za ukuaji wa msanii.

recording.title: Vipindi vya recording vinavyojengwa kwa uwazi na confidence.
recording.subtitle: Tunasaidia vocal recording, practice takes, creative direction, na session flow kwa namna inayokaribisha wasanii wapya na wale wanaorudi tena.

items.title: Vocal Recording
items.description: Session support yenye umakini kwa nyimbo, demos, spoken pieces, na mawazo ya ubunifu.

items.title: Practice Sessions
items.description: Rudia, boresha, na jenga confidence kabla ya kuingia hatua inayofuata ya recording.

items.title: Session Guidance
items.description: Creative direction inayosaidia shaping ya takes, pacing, na delivery bila pressure.

production.title: Production support kwa mawazo yanayohitaji structure na momentum.
production.subtitle: Kuanzia beat making hadi vocal arrangement, tunasaidia wasanii na wanaojifunza kusogeza mawazo yao kwenda kwenye nyimbo, drafts, na creative direction iliyo wazi zaidi.

items.title: Beat Making
items.description: Jenga rhythm, mood, na msingi wa wimbo unaolingana na creative direction yako.

items.title: Song Development
items.description: Shape arrangement, sections, na flow ili rough ideas ziwe nyimbo zilizo wazi zaidi.

items.title: Vocal Direction
items.description: Fanyia kazi uchaguzi wa performance, layering ideas, na maandalizi ya recording.

items.title: Artist Development
items.description: Tumia kila session kuimarisha process, confidence, na ukuaji wa muda mrefu.

training.title: Jifunze kwa mpangilio, fanya practice kwa msaada, na ukue kwa kasi yako.
training.subtitle: Mafunzo yameundwa kuwa beginner-friendly huku yakisaidia wanaorejea kujenga habits na technique bora zaidi.

piano.title: Piano
piano.description: Jenga hand coordination, rhythm, na melody kwa lessons zilizoongozwa na practice sessions zinazoweza kurudiwa.
bullets: Mazoezi ya kuanzia na progress paths zilizo rahisi kufuata
Creative coaching kwa confidence na consistency

guitar.title: Guitar
guitar.description: Endeleza chords, timing, na practice ya nyimbo kwa namna inayofanya kujifunza kuwa practical na motivating.
bullets: Hands-on learning yenye weekly focus areas zilizo wazi
Sessions zinazojengwa kwa playing confidence ya kweli

drums.title: Drums
drums.description: Fanyia kazi timing, groove, coordination, na performance discipline kupitia rhythm sessions zilizoongozwa.
bullets: Practice sessions zinazoboresha control na feel
Njia za beginner-friendly zenye nafasi ya kuendelea juu

vocals.title: Vocals
vocals.description: Jenga vocal confidence, control, na recording readiness kupitia coaching ya msaada na repetition.
bullets: Warm-up, delivery, na vocal practice support
Coaching inayosaidia kuunganisha sauti na expression

benefits.title: Mazingira ya kujifunza yaliyojengwa kwa creative progress ya kweli.

items.title: Beginner-Friendly Learning
items.description: Sessions zimepangwa ziwe rahisi kuingia huku zikijenga habits muhimu za ubunifu.

items.title: Practice With Purpose
items.description: Wanaojifunza husonga kwa guided practice sessions badala ya kubahatisha hatua inayofuata.

items.title: Creative Coaching
items.description: Msaada hauishii kwenye technique pekee bali pia confidence, consistency, na expression.

items.title: Studio Connection
items.description: Mafunzo na recording support vinaweza kuungana kwa urahisi wakati mwanafunzi yuko tayari kuunda zaidi.

pathway.title: Njia rahisi kutoka kujifunza hadi performance.

learn.title: Jifunze
learn.description: Anza na foundations zilizo wazi, lessons zilizoongozwa, na creative coaching ya vitendo.

practice.title: Fanya Practice
practice.description: Imarisha rhythm, timing, confidence, na control kupitia sessions zinazoweza kurudiwa.

record.title: Rekodi
record.description: Ingia kwenye recording support wakati mawazo, nyimbo, au performances ziko tayari kurekodiwa.

perform.title: Performa
perform.description: Tumia progress uliyojenga kujieleza, kushare, na kuendelea kukua kama msanii.

cta.title: Chagua studio au njia ya mafunzo unayotaka kuchunguza.
cta.subtitle: Anza na WhatsApp message iliyoelekezwa vizuri na tutakuongoza kwenye session, learning plan, au creative next step inayofaa.
cta.buttonHint: Inafungua WhatsApp ikiwa na ujumbe wa studio husika

hero.title: Creative agency inayojengwa kuzunguka multimedia production na practical creative execution.
hero.subtitle: Tripod inaunganisha brand storytelling, visual communication, production support, design and digital services, pamoja na music and creative training katika mtiririko mmoja wa ubunifu.

motif.description: Tunaunda mawazo kupitia framing iliyo wazi, collaborative thinking, na modern digital workflow.

visualCommunication.title: Visual Communication
visualCommunication.description: Lugha ya ubunifu iliyo wazi kwa ujumbe, kampeni, na uwepo wa chapa.

productionSupport.title: Production Support
productionSupport.description: Uratibu wa vitendo unaosaidia mawazo kusonga kutoka concept hadi output iliyokamilika.

digitalServices.title: Design and Digital Services
digitalServices.description: Mifumo ya ubunifu inayofanya kazi kwenye skrini, maudhui, na launch assets.

creativeTraining.title: Music and Creative Training
creativeTraining.description: Mafunzo na studio-facing support kwa wabunifu wanaotaka kuendelea kukua.

intro.title: Tripod imejengwa kuunganisha creative thinking na delivery inayotumika.
intro.description: Tunafanya kazi kama creative agency inayolenga multimedia production, visual communication, na practical execution inayosaidia mawazo kuwa matokeo halisi ya chapa na maudhui.

points.title: Huduma Zinazoungana
points.description: Brand, design, production, digital work, na studio support vinaweza kusonga pamoja bila kuhisi vimetengana.

points.title: Mawasiliano Yaliyo Wazi
points.description: Kila mradi hujengwa kupitia mwelekeo unaobaki kuwa rahisi kueleweka, wa ushirikiano, na wenye focus.

points.title: Practical Creative Execution
points.description: Tunajali mawazo mazuri, lakini pia namna mawazo hayo yanavyokamilishwa na kutumika vizuri.

mission.title: Kusaidia chapa na wabunifu kuwasiliana kwa uwazi zaidi na expression iliyo bora.
mission.description: Mission yetu ni kubadilisha mawazo kuwa visuals zenye fikra, maudhui yanayotumika, na matokeo yaliyo tayari kwa production yanayosaidia mawasiliano halisi.

vision.title: Kujenga mazingira ya ubunifu ambako storytelling na execution vinabaki karibu kila wakati.
vision.description: Tunataka Tripod ibaki kuwa nafasi ambayo design, multimedia production, na creative learning vinaunga mkono kila kimoja kwa njia za vitendo.

beliefs.title: Kazi ya ubunifu huwa imara zaidi inapobaki ya kibinadamu, yenye mpangilio, na yenye matumizi.
beliefs.subtitle: Imani hizi zinaongoza jinsi tunavyounda mawazo, kushirikiana, na kutoa matokeo katika aina tofauti za kazi ya ubunifu.

storytelling.title: Story Kabla ya Noise
storytelling.description: Visuals na kampeni hufanya kazi vizuri zaidi zinapobeba ujumbe ulio wazi na mwelekeo wa kihisia.

collaboration.title: Mchakato wa Pamoja wa Ubunifu
collaboration.description: Tunaamini matokeo bora hutokana na ushirikiano wa kweli, feedback inayotumika, na matarajio yaliyolingana.

execution.title: Ideas Zinahitaji Delivery
execution.description: Concepts ni muhimu, lakini thamani halisi huonekana pale kazi ya ubunifu inapopangwa vizuri na kuwasilishwa kwa umakini.

approach.title: Njia rahisi inayoweka ubunifu ukiendelea kwa kusudi.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Tunaanza kwa kuelewa malengo, hadhira, mazingira, na aina ya story ambayo kazi inahitaji kubeba.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: Direction huundwa kuwa mpango wa vitendo kwa visuals, messaging, production support, na digital output.

create.title: Create
create.description: Design, content, media, na studio-facing work huendelezwa kwa consistency na nafasi ya feedback.

deliver.title: Deliver
deliver.description: Outputs za mwisho huandaliwa kwa uwazi ili ziweze kuzinduliwa, kushirikishwa, kuchapishwa, kupostiwa, au kuendelezwa zaidi.

culture.title: Utamaduni unaojengwa na udadisi, msaada, na creative momentum ya uhakika.
culture.description: Ambapo picha halisi za timu bado hazijapatikana, tunaeleza mazingira kupitia aina ya ushirikiano na nguvu ambayo kazi inajengwa juu yake.

points.title: Youthful lakini Professional
points.description: Tunalenga nguvu, relevance, na taste nzuri huku tukidumisha kazi kuwa ya kuaminika na iliyopangwa vizuri.

points.title: Mindset ya Kujifunza
points.description: Ukuaji wa ubunifu ni muhimu kwetu iwe kazi ni ya mteja, maendeleo ya ndani, au studio training.

points.title: Supportive Execution
points.description: Utamaduni huu umejengwa kusaidia mawazo yasogee mbele kwa msuguano mdogo na confidence kubwa zaidi.

tiles.title: Team Flow
tiles.description: Mawazo, reviews, na production tasks husonga kwa rhythm inayoonyesha momentum.

tiles.title: Shared Perspective
tiles.description: Creative disciplines tofauti hubaki aligned kupitia direction ya pamoja na practical check-ins.

tiles.title: Flexible Thinking
tiles.description: Tunapenda nafasi ya exploration, lakini exploration hiyo hubaki imeunganishwa na outcomes zinazotumika.

tiles.title: Creative Presence
tiles.description: Atmosphere inaunga mkono brand work, production support, na learning bila kujifanya kuwa kitu ambacho hakijathibitishwa.

cta.title: Ikiwa creative direction inafaa, tuanze mazungumzo.
cta.subtitle: Wasiliana kwa WhatsApp kama unataka kujadili mradi, kuchunguza multimedia production support, au kujifunza zaidi kuhusu jinsi Tripod inavyofanya kazi.

hero.title: Book kazi ya ubunifu, studio support, na digital services ndani ya mtiririko mmoja wa vitendo.
hero.subtitle: Tumia form kwa brief iliyo na mpangilio au ingia moja kwa moja WhatsApp kama tayari unajua unachohitaji.

form.title: Shirikisha maelezo ya project yako.
form.subtitle: Form hii hubaki client-side only na huandaa ombi lako kwa WhatsApp ikiwa na taarifa muhimu tayari zimejazwa.

placeholders.name: Jina lako
placeholders.message: Eleza Tripod kuhusu project, lengo, au booking unayohitaji.

errors.name: Tafadhali andika jina lako.
errors.phone: Tafadhali andika namba yako ya simu.

whatsapp.title: Unapendelea ujumbe wa moja kwa moja?
whatsapp.subtitle: Fungua WhatsApp ikiwa na prompt ya mawasiliano iliyo tayari na endelea na mazungumzo huko.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp
whatsapp.value: Anza mazungumzo ya moja kwa moja ya booking

location.title: Pata maelezo ya Tripod hapa yatakapokuwa tayari.
location.placeholderText: Anwani iliyothibitishwa bado haijaongezwa, kwa hiyo sehemu hii imeachwa wazi kama placeholder.

items.question: Booking form inafanyaje kazi?
items.answer: Form hii hubaki client-side only. Ukijaza taarifa sahihi na kutuma, huunda WhatsApp message yenye maelezo yako na kufungua chat hiyo.

items.question: Naweza kutumia WhatsApp bila kujaza form yote?
items.answer: Ndiyo. Instant WhatsApp card na CTA ya mwisho zote zinakuwezesha kuanza mazungumzo ya moja kwa moja bila kumaliza brief yote kwanza.

items.question: Vipi kama sijui huduma gani inafaa project yangu?
items.answer: Chagua General Inquiry kwenye form au anza WhatsApp chat na eleza matokeo unayotaka. Tripod inaweza kusaidia kupanga mchanganyiko wa huduma unaofaa.

items.question: Ukurasa huu unatuma taarifa zangu kwenye backend?
items.answer: Hapana. Phase hii inatumia client-side flow tu na haijengi database, API route, wala mfumo wa kutuma email.

cta.title: Ukiwa tayari, Tripod iko umbali wa ujumbe mmoja tu.
cta.subtitle: Tuma brief ya project, uliza swali la booking, au anza na general creative inquiry.
